name: Corn Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1 Can corn or 2 1/2 cups fresh (2 lb.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Drain 2 pounds of kernel corn or 2 1/2 cups fresh corn.
3. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
4. Stir in the flour until blended.
5. Gradually stir in 1 cup of corn liquid and enough chopped pimento to make the mixture reach boiling point.
6. Reduce heat once boiling, then beat the egg yolks well.
7. Pour part of the corn mixture over the beaten egg yolks and mix gently.
8. Return this mixture to the pan and stir until the yolk thickens slightly.
9. Add 3/4 teaspoon salt, 1/4 teaspoon paprika, and fold in the egg whites until stiff.
10. Fold in 1/4 cup of crumbled bacon that has been fried crisp.
11. Pour the batter into a baking dish and bake for 30 minutes at 350°F.
